protocol_override: User approved Codex/GPT self-judge instead of Gemini API.

parsed.signature_a: A computes the greatest common divisor, given non-negative integers, producing a positive integer.
parsed.signature_b: B computes a selected arithmetic operation, given an operation tag and two integers, producing an integer.

same_problem.why: The programs compute different outputs or solve different requested tasks.

same_technique.why: Their core programming techniques are different.

same_domain.why: Both operate on shared domain(s): integers.
